title: Alan Walker Music
description: This mod brings the unforgettable sounds of Alan Walker directly into your Minecraft world!
body:
![AWMusicLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c88415f8ac4104050c8777c828f5930d5f004db9.png) This mod brings the unforgettable sounds of Alan Walker directly into your Minecraft world! Discover new, collectible music tracks and face three unique new mobs that provide a musical challenge. # New Music Discs
Adds a set of custom music discs to the game, featuring iconic Alan Walker songs. The following songs have been added: -Avalon
-Old Habits
-WorldOfWalker - Rise of the Drones
-Believers
-Creator Circle
-Dust
-Faded
-Heartbreak Melody
-Time
-Moonshine
-Incommunicado
-Welcome to Walkerworld
-Sailing
-Welcome to Lonely Club
**- and many more**
# Custom Mobs
Custom Mobs Encounter three unique new mobs that fit the Alan Walker world theme. These offer an exciting addition to the gameplay. The following mobs are included: ### Alan Walker:
This mob is peaceful. ### Zombified Alan:
This mob is recognizable by its red eyes. It attacks you and inflicts damage. ### Bodyguard:
It protects you from all evil mobs.

# Commands Here are some useful commands for the Alan Walker Music Mod: **/summon alan_walker_music:alan_walker - Summons the Alan Walker mob.
**
**/summon alan_walker_music:bad_alan - Summons the Bad Alan mob.
**
**/summon alan_walker_music:the_guard - Summons The Guard mob.
**
**/info - Display my Websites**
# Modpack
We now have a modpack for easier installation.
You can find it at [https://modrinth.com/modpack/alan-walker-music-modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alan-walker-music-modpack) # A small preview of the mod
